title: error.rs Transport display: 0x99 mapped to wrong TPM_RC name
description:
wolftpm-tss/src/error.rs, Error::Transport Display impl, line 40.

The match arm:
  0x0099 => Some("TPM_RC_COMMAND_CODE"),

is wrong on two counts:
1. 0x99 (153 decimal) is not a defined TPM2 Part 2 error code. It falls in the FMT1 range (0x80-0xBF) but no standard FMT1 base code has value 0x19.
2. TPM_RC_COMMAND_CODE is a VER1 error at 0x143 (323 decimal), not 0x99.

Impact: display only — the Transport variant stores the raw code and callers check the enum variant, not the string. But the wrong label misleads developers reading diagnostics.

Fix: remove the 0x0099 arm (it should not be there) and optionally add the correct VER1 codes that are likely to appear at the transport layer, e.g. 0x0143 => Some("TPM_RC_COMMAND_CODE").
